title: BC Business Corporations Act company compliance obligation pack
description: Draft operational schedules for BC company annual maintenance, records, and securities-register evidence.

rules.title: BC company annual report
rules.summary: Track a BC company annual report from the incorporation or recognition anniversary.

checklist: Review the BC company registry profile as of the anniversary date.
Confirm directors, registered office, records office, and company status.
File the annual report through the BC Registry path.
Archive confirmation, receipt, and profile-report evidence.

rules.caveat: Draft operational workflow; confirm current BC Registry instructions for the company subtype.

rules.title: BC company director minimum review
rules.summary: Review director count and eligibility for a BC company.

authority.displayCitation: BC Business Corporations Act director and records guidance

checklist: Confirm the company has at least one director, or three if public-company rules apply.
Confirm directors are individuals and eligibility evidence is archived.
Archive director consents, resignations, and register updates.
Create corrective tasks for vacancies or missing evidence.

rules.caveat: Public company and subtype rules can change the minimum director count.

rules.title: BC company records and securities register review
rules.summary: Review BC company records, articles, incorporation agreement, resolutions, and central securities register annually.

checklist: Confirm certificates, orders, notice of articles, articles, and incorporation agreement are archived.
Review the central securities register against share transactions.
Confirm shareholder and director minutes or resolutions are archived.
Record corrective tasks for missing records.

rules.caveat: Operational review cadence only; inspection and retention duties depend on record type and company subtype.
